name: AksharChem (India) Limited
summary: AksharChem (India) Limited engages in the manufacture and sale of dyes and pigments in India. The company offers vinyl sulphone, sulpho para vinyl sulphone, ortho anicidine vinyl sulphone, and h-acid for use in the textile industry; and CPC green for printing ink, rubber, plastic, paint, and leather industries. It also exports its products to Europe, the Far East, South East Asia, China, the United States, and internationally. The company was formerly known as Audichem (India) Limited and changed its name to AksharChem (India) Limited in March 2003. AksharChem (India) Limited was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Mehsana, India.
